news.headline: CEO H. Wyatt Flippen updates shareholders of Global Technologies, Ltd (OTC: GTLL) on innovation and sustainable growth in technology and services on Dec 19, 2024 from Parsippany, NJ.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Parsippany, NJ, Global Technologies, Ltd (OTC: GTLL), a diverse company leading advancements and promoting sustainable development in the technology and service industries, made an announcement.

news.headline: Golden Matrix (NASDAQ: GMGI) to attend 2025 ICR Conference on Jan 13-15, 2025 in Orlando, FL.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Golden Matrix Group Inc. (NASDAQ: GMGI) disclosed their participation in the 2025 ICR Conference happening from January 13-15, 2025 at the Grande Lakes Resort in Orlando, FL. Golden Matrix is a company specializing in developing and licensing online gaming platforms, systems, and content. The management of the company will be present at the event.

news.headline: Big 5 Sporting Goods renews credit facility with Bank of America, N.A. for five years. Dec. 19, 2024. Nasdaq: BGFV.
news.summary: EL SEGUNDO, Calif., Dec. 19, 2024 – Big 5 Sporting Goods Corporation (Nasdaq: BGFV), a prominent sporting goods retailer, revealed it reached a deal to modify and prolong its credit facility with Bank of America, N. A. The agreement with Bank of America, as administrative agent and lender, involves an extension to the Loan Agreement.

news.headline: FDA approves Opus Genetics' Phase 3 trial of APX3330 for Diabetic Retinopathy under special protocol assessment.
AON's specialty pharmacy in Fort Myers, FL, reaccredited by ACHC, part of fast-growing oncology network in US.
news.summary: In Fort Myers, Florida, on December 19, 2024, American Oncology Network (AON) disclosed that its specialty pharmacy, part of one of the quickest expanding oncology networks in the US, has successfully gained reaccreditation from the Accreditation Commission for Health Care (ACHC). AON, trading on the OTCQX under the ticker symbol AONC, continues to solidify its position with this accomplishment.

news.headline: Sonoro Gold Corp closes C$500,000 private placement with 5,555,556 units sold at C$0.09 each.
news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada, on December 19, 2024, Sonoro Gold Corp. successfully closed a non-brokered private placement offering (the “Offering”) of 5,555,556 units (the “Units”) at C$0.09 per Unit. This resulted in total gross proceeds of C$500,000. Sonoro Gold Corp. is listed under the tickers TSXV: SGO, OTCQB: SMOFF, and FRA: 23SP.

news.headline: authID's technology enhances transparency for EinStrong Foundation, boosting accountability to donors, and accelerating social impact efforts.
news.summary: NGO operations are set to be transformed by the revolutionary continuous authentication technology of the Verified platform. This advancement will bring unparalleled transparency and accountability to donors, significantly enhancing the efficiency of social impact initiatives.

news.headline: NV5 receives $7 million in contracts from Philadelphia for infrastructure design, aiming to improve city life by 2028.
news.summary: In Hollywood, Florida, on December 19, 2024, NV5 Global, Inc. (Nasdaq: NVEE), a technology, certification, and consulting services provider, disclosed the acquisition of infrastructure design contracts worth upwards of $7 million from the City of Philadelphia. The projects covered under this agreement are slated for completion by 2028. The initiative aims to bolster the city's efforts to foster resilient and sustainable communities, with a focus on enhancing safety and quality of life for its populace.

news.headline: UK rate futures point to about 55 basis points of BoE rate cuts by the end of 2025 vs around 45 bps before BoE policy announcement.
Quoin Pharmaceuticals gets FDA clearance for new QRX003 Netherton Syndrome study. QRX003 is a lotion with serine protease inhibitor for skin shedding.
news.summary: In Ashburn, Virginia on December 19, 2024, Quoin Pharmaceuticals Ltd. (NASDAQ: QNRX) shared that the FDA has granted approval for a new clinical trial for QRX003, their topical lotion designed to address Netherton Syndrome (NS). This rare and orphan disease involves excessive skin shedding and is targeted by the lotion containing a serine protease inhibitor. Quoin is a specialty pharmaceutical company dedicated to rare diseases and is currently in the clinical stage of development. This new study marks a significant step in addressing NS, showcasing the company's commitment to finding solutions for challenging medical conditions.

news.headline: NexGold grants 383,455 restricted share units to directors and officers, vesting annually and expiring on December 31, 2027.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 19, 2024, NexGold Mining Corp. revealed that it has granted 383,455 restricted share units (RSUs) to specific directors and officers under the 2024 Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan. This issuance is in accordance with the plan and the RSUs' vesting structure involves one-third vesting annually, with full vesting occurring on the first anniversary of the grant date. The RSUs will expire on December 31, 2027. Upon vesting, each RSU entitles the holder to receive one common share of the Company. This news comes after NexGold disclosed its stock exchange listings on the TSXV as NEXG and OTCQX as NXGCF.

news.headline: New advisory board by Immuneering focuses on pancreatic cancer, aiming to bring together experts to improve patient outcomes.
Applied Digital (Nasdaq: APLD) to hold conference call on Jan 14, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss Q2 results ended Nov 30, 2024. Press release post-market.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 19, 2024, Applied Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: APLD) announced they will conduct a conference call on January 14, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. This call will address their operations and financial performance for the fiscal second quarter concluding on November 30, 2024. Following the market close on the same day, a press release with these details will be made available. Applied Digital specializes in advanced digital infrastructure for High-Performance Computing (HPC) applications.

news.headline: BioTools to present at 43rd J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.
news.summary: The recent report reveals a significant increase in global temperatures by 1.5 degrees Celsius compared to pre-industrial levels. This rise is mainly attributed to human activities, including the burning of fossil fuels and deforestation. The data illustrates that this increase is directly linked to extreme weather events, such as heatwaves, hurricanes, and wildfires, impacting millions worldwide. Furthermore, the report predicts that if current trends continue, the global temperature could rise by 3 degrees Celsius by the end of this century. This escalation poses a severe threat to ecosystems, biodiversity, and human life. It is crucial to take immediate action to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and implement sustainable practices to mitigate further temperature rises. The report serves as a stark reminder of the urgent need for global cooperation to combat climate change and protect the planet for future generations.

news.headline: D. Boral Capital helped Webuy Global Ltd (Nasdaq: WBUY) in a $3.7M Registered Direct Offering of 21,013,239 Class A shares at $0.1756 per share on Dec. 17, 2024.
news.summary: On December 17, 2024, Webuy Global Ltd (Nasdaq: WBUY), an e-commerce retailer in Southeast Asia focusing on groceries and travel, closed a registered direct offering. The offering involved selling 21,013,239 Class A ordinary shares (or equivalents) at a price of $0.1756 per share. Additionally, pre-funded warrants were sold at a price of $0.1755, excluding an exercise price of $0.0001 per share.

news.headline: illumin Holdings Inc. (TSX:ILLM) received approval for a normal course issuer bid from TSX on Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, illumin Holdings Inc. (TSX: ILLM) (OTCQB: ILLMF) disclosed that they have gained authorization from the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) for a normal course issuer bid (NCIB). This bid denotes the company's intention to repurchase a certain number of outstanding common shares, with the approval from TSX indicating a green light for illumin to move forward with this initiative.

news.headline: Media companies are vying for the attention of executives by launching newsletters and events geared toward the C-suite.
news.summary: Several media companies are exploring avenues to expand revenue by offering newsletters and hosting events targeted at top executives.

news.headline: President-elect's influence on policy felt by investors and Washington, despite a month until taking office.
news.summary: In just 30 days, the incoming President will officially assume office, yet his impact on policy is resonating with both investors and the political landscape in Washington.

news.headline: Secured overnight financing rate 4.57% December 18th vs 4.62% December 17th.
Thumzup expands to South Florida from West LA, boosting presence in advertising & gig economy sectors.
news.summary: Thumzup Media Corporation, a leading player in social media branding and programmatic marketing solutions trading on Nasdaq under the symbol TZUP, revealed its expansion plans into South Florida from its current stronghold in West Los Angeles on December 19, 2024. The move signals the company's dedication to broadening its presence in the advertising and gig economy industries.

news.headline: Atlantica buys US development platform.
Rakovina Therapeutics marks successful 2024, looks to transformative 2025. based on DNA-damage response, updates on TSX-V: RKV.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 19, 2024, Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. (TSX-V: RKV), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in innovative cancer treatments utilizing DNA-damage response technologies, released a corporate update. They highlighted their achievements in 2024 and disclosed upcoming corporate goals for 2025.

news.headline: Oil’s future may not be as dire as expected, analysts say. Market prices are holding steady around $50/barrel.
The James of Irvine will provide luxury senior living in Orange County in an eight-story retirement community, set to open in summer 2027.
news.summary: Scheduled to open in summer 2027 in Irvine, California, the James of Irvine, an eight-story retirement community, is designed to cater to baby boomers with upscale amenities and a vibrant lifestyle. It will be the region's inaugural senior living facility, offering a new standard of living for seniors.

news.headline: After purchasing 990 Bitcoin for $100M, Hut 8's BTC holdings now exceed $1B amid fast institutional crypto adoption.
news.summary: Hut 8 has purchased 990 Bitcoin for a total of $100 million, increasing its overall BTC holdings to more than $1 billion. The move comes as institutional interest in cryptocurrency continues to rise.

Morgan Healthcare Conference. The Chief Executive Officer of Capsida is set to present at the conference...

news.headline: Silynxcom introduces new headset for armored vehicles to detect threat drones, enhancing safety. Netanya, Israel, Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Netanya, Israel, on Dec. 19, 2024, Silynxcom Ltd. (NYSE American: SYNX) introduced a new product designed for enhancing situational awareness and safety for personnel in heavy military vehicles. The company, known for producing durable tactical communication headsets, revealed the innovative technology to address a pressing issue faced by artillery operators and APC crews. This cutting-edge product aims to detect the unique drone hum sound in high-noise environments while still providing crucial hearing protection. This unveiling highlights Silynxcom's dedication to improving safety in military settings.

news.headline: Netcompany announces buyback program transactions with significant numbers.
Bitcoin's price rebounds to $102,250 after plummeting to $98,839 following the FOMC meeting, down 2.5% in 24 hours. Fed actions and inflation concerns fuel the volatility.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) dropped sharply to $98,839 after reaching above $105,000 before recovering to $102,250 following the FOMC meeting. Within a 24-hour period, Bitcoin experienced a 2.5% decrease. Analyst Ali Martinez noted that the reaction was not in response to the anticipated 25-basis-point rate cut, but rather concerns about ongoing inflation and the potential for sustained high interest rates. Despite the apprehension, Martinez suggested traders remain composed and vigilant in monitoring the situation. For further details, read the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Palantir secures $618.9M Army contract for AI and data enhancements, $400.7M over 4 years.
news.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) stocks are up in premarket trading on Thursday following the announcement of an extended partnership with the U.S. Army. The company revealed that it will continue providing the Army Vantage capability for the “Army Data Platform.” This new agreement is worth $400.7 million over four years, with a possible maximum value of $618.9 million. The objective of this extended partnership is to effectively utilize data throughout the Department of the Army, facilitating enhanced integration.

news.headline: Beko achieves highest ESG score in DHP Household Durables Industry for 6th year, with impressive 89/100 rating.
news.summary: For the sixth year in a row, Beko, a renowned company in consumer durables and electronics, has retained its top position by scoring an impressive 89 out of 100 for its commitment to sustainability. This achievement solidifies Beko's reputation as a global leader in promoting environmentally friendly practices. The accomplishment was announced in Istanbul on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Major publication reports on the importance of fair wages for workers.
New Era Helium to ring Nasdaq opening bell on Jan 2, 2025, beginning trading year, marking success in 2024.
news.summary: Midland, TX-based New Era Helium, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEHC) is set to ring the opening bell at Nasdaq on January 2, 2025, marking the start of the new year. The company is an exploration and production firm that extracts helium from natural gas reserves in the Permian Basin. The year 2024 has been significant for New Era Helium, as they achieved milestones and completed their business operations successfully. The selection by Nasdaq reflects the company's growth and market presence.

news.headline: Amy E. Dahl, 50, elected to EMCOR Group, Inc. Board of Directors effective Dec 18, 2024.
news.summary: EMCOR Group, Inc. disclosed the appointment of Amy E. Dahl, aged 50, as a new member of the Company’s Board of Directors, effective from December 18, 2024. Ms. Dahl currently serves as the Vice President of International Business & Strategy at The Toro Company (“Toro”), which trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TTC. Toro is a prominent global supplier of inventive solutions for outdoor settings, encompassing turf and landscape care, snow and ice upkeep, and underground utility development.

news.headline: Global Graphene Market to reach $2.94 billion by 2029 at 24.0% CAGR, driven by demand in various industries and technological advancements in manufacturing processes. Key players include Graphenea S.A, First Graphene, NanoXplore Inc. Drivers: growing demand; Restraints: difficulty in mass production; Opportunities: rising demand in energy storage applications. Bulk Graphene segment to grow with highest CAGR; Graphite to have largest share in terms of value.
news.summary: The global graphene market is projected to grow significantly, reaching $2.94 billion by 2029 from $1.00 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 24.0% from 2024 to 2029. The demand for graphene is increasing in various industries like electronics, automotive, aerospace, and construction. The market is benefiting from technological advancements in manufacturing processes. Key players in the market include Graphenea S.A, First Graphene, NanoXplore Inc., among others. Drivers of market growth include demand in key end-use industries, while challenges include difficulties in mass production and lack of standardization. The bulk graphene segment is expected to grow at the highest CAGR, with graphite holding the largest share. 358 market data tables, 57 figures, and 295 pages are included in the study.

news.headline: Global spice and herb market expected to reach US$275.01 billion by 2034. North America leads with US$38.55 billion in 2024.
news.summary: The global spice and herb market is valued at US$ 172.08 billion in 2024, with a projected 4.8% CAGR through 2034. The food processing industry drives this growth, utilizing spices in products like seasonings and snacks. North America leads due to demand for organic and functional spices, with China comprising 9% of East Asia’s market share. By 2034, the market is expected to reach US$ 275.01 billion globally. Powder/granule spice sales will grow at 3% CAGR, while South Korea’s spice and herb demand is forecasted to hit US$ 14.67 billion by 2034. The herb segment holds a 5% revenue share in 2024.

news.headline: BigBear.ai to exchange $182.3 million of existing 6.00% convertible notes due 2026 for new 6.00% convertible notes in 2029.
news.summary: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BBAI) based in Columbia, Maryland, revealed on December 19, 2024, that it has engaged in privately negotiated exchange agreements known as the Exchange Agreements with a select group of holders of its 6.00% convertible senior notes due 2026 (referred to as Existing Convertible Notes). Through these agreements, BigBear.ai is set to exchange about $182.3 million in total principal amount.

news.headline: Organon's CEO and CFO to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 13th.
news.summary: CEO Kevin Ali and CFO Matthew Walsh of Organon will participate in a fireside chat at the upcoming 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Monday, January 13th. The event will take place in Jersey City, New Jersey.

news.headline: Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) releases its first Sustainability Report, highlighting progress towards sustainable business practices.
news.summary: A technology platform reshaping real estate industry, The Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) based in Toronto and New York, has unveiled its inaugural Sustainability Report. Tamir Poleg, Chairman and CEO of Real, expressed pride in this milestone, emphasizing the company's commitment to responsible business practices and sustainability in the real estate sector. The report highlights the progress made so far and outlines plans for a sustainable future. This announcement signifies a significant move towards promoting eco-friendly practices in the industry.

news.headline: Realbotix Corp. reports strong 2025 outlook, highlights growth in AI, robotics, cryptocurrency holdings. CEO Andrew Kiguel optimistic.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Realbotix Corp. (TSX-V: XBOT) (Frankfurt Stock Exchange: 76M0.F) (OTC: XBOTF), a prominent developer of humanoid robots and AI companions, has released its business forecast for 2025. CEO Andrew Kiguel expressed optimism for the upcoming year, highlighting growth in companionship products, advancements in AI technology, and investments in cryptocurrency. The company saw significant transformations in 2024 with ventures into AI and robotics, a rebranding, and a name change, showcasing a strategic shift towards futuristic technologies.

news.headline: Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) raises dividend by 14.3%, to C$0.01333 per share for January 2025, payable on Jan 17.
news.summary: In Montreal, Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) has revealed a 14.3% rise in the monthly dividend payment for January 2025, set at C$0.01333 per common share (or annual C$0.16 per common share). Shareholders of record as of January 9, 2025, are set to receive this dividend on January 17, 2025. This marks the fifty-eighth (58th) dividend and the forty-eighth (48th) monthly dividend payment issued by the Corporation.

news.headline: HPQ Silicon settles $4.9M debt with PyroGenesis, strengthens balance sheet.
news.summary: In Montreal, on December 19, 2024, HPQ Silicon Inc. announced its approval of settling debts amounting to $4,941,440.16 with PyroGenesis Inc., its technology supplier. HPQ, a technology company focused on green engineering of silica and silicon-based materials, is bolstering its balance sheet with this move. The settlement was approved by the Corporation’s Board of Directors. HPQ is listed on TSX-V as HPQ, OTCQB as HPQFF, and FRA as O08.

news.headline: ZenaTech’s ZenaDrone relocates to Arizona to manufacture US Defense drones with Quantum Computing technology.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, ZenaTech, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZENA) (FSE: 49Q), a tech firm focused on AI drone solutions powered by Quantum Computing, Drones as a Service, and enterprise SaaS, shared that its subsidiary ZenaDrone has relocated to a manufacturing plant in Phoenix, Arizona. This move aims to design US Defense and NATO drones, promoting the production of drones manufactured in the United States. The new facility will house manufacturing, assembly, research and development, sales, pilot, and training teams. Furthermore, it includes an aeronautical test range site for showcasing drone capabilities.

news.headline: BP and Iraq make progress on Kirkuk oil and gas fields redevelopment.
Dragonfly Energy partners with Stevens Transport to transition fleet to hybrid battery solutions, secures large order for All-Electric APUs.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. disclosed that they have landed a significant purchase order for their Battle Born® All-Electric APUs from Stevens Transport, Inc., a major temperature-controlled freight carrier in North America. The order underscores Stevens Transport's dedication to adopting innovative and environmentally friendly transportation solutions. This collaboration marks a crucial point in Stevens Transport's effort to spearhead the use of cutting-edge technology and sustainability in the trucking sector. The family-owned full truckload carrier, operating extensively across North America, is keen on superior technology, operational efficiency, and environmental responsibility. Dragonfly Energy is recognized for its expertise in energy storage and battery technology, and listed as Nasdaq: DFLI.

news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) announced its second quarter fiscal year 2025 results ending on November 24, 2024. In comparison to the previous year's fiscal period, the company reported its net sales...

news.headline: FuelCell Energy discloses Q4 and FY 2024 financial results.
news.summary: In recent statistics, it was reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This drop equates to approximately 500,000 individuals finding employment. Additionally, the economy saw a growth of 3.2% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. The stock market also experienced a rise, with the main indexes climbing by 2.5% on average. These positive indicators have led to increased optimism among analysts and investors regarding the future economic outlook.

news.headline: Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited (Nasdaq: CLWT) reports 8.8% decrease in revenue to US$7,259,000 for 1H 2024.
news.summary: Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker CLWT, has released its unaudited financial results for the six months leading up to June 30, 2024. During this period, the company recorded a revenue of US$7,259,000, representing an 8.8% decline compared to the previous period.

news.headline: Amesite's NurseMagic™ AI boosts marketing reach to key markets, with meteoric rise in social media engagement in B2C/B2B healthcare, improving sales.
news.summary: A company is experiencing significant growth in its outreach and interaction by expanding its business-to-consumer (B2C) and business-to-business (B2B) sales through an AI-driven solution specifically tailored for the healthcare industry. This initiative has resulted in a substantial increase in customer connections and sales figures. The company's approach underscores the effectiveness of integrating AI technology in boosting sales and customer engagement, with an impressive rise in both B2C and B2B metrics.
